items.name: Gimbap
items.description: Traditional Korean snack made from cooked rice, beef, egg, carrot, sweet radish and spinach - all rolled in roasted seaweed and topped with sesame seeds.
items.simplified_description: Korean rice roll with beef, egg, vegetables, and sesame seeds.

items.name: Grilled Bowl
items.description: Choice of Protein and caramelized onions on top of fresh salad greens and rice, topped w/ sweet soy reduction, sesame seeds and green onion. **Options for gluten-free available on request** Please inform us of any food allergies or other dietary restrictions.
items.simplified_description: Protein with caramelized onions, salad greens, rice, and sweet soy sauce.

items.name: Bibimbap
items.description: Traditional Korean mixed rice bowl - with your choice of protein, pan fried shitake mushrooms, carrots, zucchini, and bean sprouts topped with a sunny side egg, our sweet soy reduction, sesame and green onion.
items.simplified_description: Mixed rice bowl with protein, vegetables, egg, and sweet soy sauce.

items.name: Grilled Salmon Bowl
items.description: Grilled salmon on top of fresh salad greens and rice - topped with sweet soy reduction, masago, cucumber, sesame, green onion and nori.
items.simplified_description: Grilled salmon with salad greens, rice, and sweet soy sauce.

items.name: Grilled Unagi Bowl
items.description: Grilled unagi (BBQ eel) and fresh salad greens and rice - topped with sweet soy reduction, masago, cucumber, sesame, green onion and nori.
items.simplified_description: Grilled BBQ eel with salad greens, rice, and sweet soy sauce.

items.name: Korean Fried Chicken w/ Rice
items.description: Crispy tempura battered chicken and tossed in our honey-gochujang sauce. Served with a side of rice and greens, topped with sesame and green onions.
items.simplified_description: Crispy chicken in honey-gochujang sauce with rice and greens.

items.name: Korean Fried Cauliflower w/ Rice
items.description: Crispy tempura battered cauliflower and tossed in our honey-gochujang sauce. Served with a side of rice and greens, topped with sesame and green onions.
items.simplified_description: Crispy cauliflower in honey-gochujang sauce with rice and greens.

items.name: Japchae
items.description: Savoury sweet-potato glass noodles stir fried with your choice of protein, garden vegetables such as onions, carrots, green onions and mushrooms tossed in a sweet soy/sesame reduction. Served with a side of rice and salad greens.
items.simplified_description: Sweet potato noodles stir-fried with protein and vegetables in soy sauce.
